name: frontend-dev-tools
description: Development tools for frontend linting and formatting

scripts.minify:js:static: for f in static/js/full/**/*.js; do out=${f/static\/js\/full/static\/js\/min}; mkdir -p $(dirname $out); ./node_modules/.bin/terser $f -o $out --compress; done
scripts.minify:js:non: for f in non-static/full/**/*.js; do out=${f/non-static\/full/non-static\/min}; mkdir -p $(dirname $out); ./node_modules/.bin/terser $f -o $out --compress; done
scripts.minify:css: for f in static/css/full/**/*.css; do out=${f/static\/css\/full/static\/css\/min}; mkdir -p $(dirname $out); ./node_modules/.bin/csso $f -o $out; done
